title: cyclobalanopsis lineata var. oxyodon
intro: Cyclobalanopsis lineata var. oxyodon, also known as the Chinese corktree, is a species of evergreen tree native to the mountainous regions of China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The bark, leaves, and roots of the Chinese corktree are used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, sore throats, and respiratory problems, with benefits including reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and enhanced overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being incorporated into traditional Chinese medicinal formulas to support health and vitality.
